ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stage of the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of simulation */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team conducting the simulation */,
  "vdwaals" REAL /* vdWaals energy value */,
  "eel" REAL /* EEL energy value */,
  "epb" REAL /* EPB energy value */,
  "enpolar" REAL /* ENPOLAR energy value */,
  "edisper" REAL /* EDISPER energy value */,
  "g_gas" REAL /* G gas energy value */,
  "g_solv" REAL /* G solv energy value */,
  "total" REAL /* Total energy value */,
  "log_file" TEXT /* File path to the simulation log file */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_simulation_type FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_type") REFERENCES simulation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stage in seconds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date the stage started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date the stage ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the setting belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_settings_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the log file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the log file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the log file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the log file was uploaded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the log file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_values" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy value */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the energy value belongs to */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy (e.g., vdWaals, EEL) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the energy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_values_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
